# CWE-1322 positive: blocking sleep in async worker (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1322-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1322: Use of Blocking Code in Single-threaded, Non-blocking Context.
// Vulnerable: event loop goroutine calls time.Sleep while draining webhook queue.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

func StartWebhookWorkerPure(db *sql.DB) http.HandlerFunc {
	queue := make(chan string, 32)
	go func() {
		for payload := range queue {
			time.Sleep(2 * time.Second)
			_, _ = db.Exec("INSERT INTO webhook_events (payload) VALUES ($1)", payload)
		}
	}()
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if err := r.ParseForm(); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		queue <- r.FormValue("payload")
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"queued":true}`))
	}
}
